title: Polish Governance All — Constituição Operacional do Homelab
goal: Tratar todos os 17 findings da auditoria do homelab com governanca industrial em 6 secoes: dados, secrets, rede, operacoes, observabilidade, compliance.
scope: DATA_GOVERNANCE — schema registry, store selection, data lifecycle, qdrant contract
SECRETS_GOVERNANCE — vault KeePassXC, shred plaintext, pgpass, secret-audit.sh, rotacao trimestral
NETWORK_GOVERNANCE — UFW activation, port matrix, tunnel hardening, docker isolation, tailscale ACL
OPERATIONAL_GOVERNANCE — cron watchdog, backup verification, incident playbook, service map
OBSERVABILITY_GOVERNANCE — prometheus contract, alert rules, grafana dashboards, log rotation
COMPLIANCE_MATRIX — mapping a CONTRACT.md, audit schedule, escalation, governance-audit.sh
done_definition: Fase 1 CRITICAL: vault criado, plaintext eliminado, postgres password nao visivel em ps aux
Fase 2 HIGH: app.json.bak* deletados, MCP config refatorado, schema registry escrito, rotation policy documentada
Fase 3 MEDIUM: health checks no crontab, backup verification, incident playbook, observability contract
Fase 4 LOW: UFW documentado, compliance matrix, governance-audit.sh rodando
next_actions: FASE 1 — CRITICAL (humano): criar vault KeePassXC, migrar credenciais, shred rascunho-s.txt, fix postgres password
FASE 2 — HIGH: deletar app.json.bak*, refatorar MCP config, escrever schema registry, documentar rotation policy
simulation_commands: ps aux | grep -i password | grep -v grep
blockers: Fase 1 requer acao manual do humano (manuseio de credenciais)
UFW activation requer aprovacao per GUARDRAILS.md

fase_1_critical.label: CRITICAL — Dia 1
items: Migrar credenciais do Desktop para vault
Fix Postgres CLI password via .pgpass ou env var

fase_2_high.label: HIGH — Dias 2-3
items: Refatorar MCP config (env var para Cloudflare token)

handoff.resume_prompt: ADR Polish-Governance-All proposta com 6 secoes de governanca cobrindo 17 findings. FASE 1 (CRITICAL) requer acao do humano: criar vault KeePassXC, migrar credenciais, shred plaintext, fix postgres password. Apos Fase 1 concluida pelo humano, codex pode avancar Fases 2-4. Consulte execution_phases para status de cada fase.
